entity.summary: Decentralized exchange surface within the Convergence Finance ecosystem, with current spot markets and recent trading activity.
entity.notes: CoinGecko reports current spot markets and recent trading activity for the Convergence Finance DEX. Launch date remains null because this review did not recover a sufficiently precise launch marker.

evidence.title: Convergence Finance DEX application
evidence.notes: First-party trading application used as the current service identity reference.

evidence.title: Convergence Finance exchange profile and current markets
evidence.notes: DEX directory profile reports current spot pairs and recent 24-hour trading volume for Convergence Finance.
